text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm super nervous about the next test... But I have to make sure I pass!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Maybe I can turn my study materials
into a song!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm the best when it comes to
songwriting! ☆ I'll start with a song about history,
another about science, and then finish with a
short poem by me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be super popular with other people who
suck at studying! It might even make it to number
one on the charts. ☆
